questionHtml:
Kirchhoff’s laws are applied to the circuit shown.

What is the equation for the dotted loop?

A. 0 = 3I2 + 4I3

B. 0 = 4I3 − 3I2

C. 6 = 2I1 + 3I2 + 4I3

D. 6 = 3I2 + 4I3

meta.title: Kirchhoff’s laws are applied to the circuit shown. What is the equation for the dotted loop? A. 0 = 3I2 + 4I3 B. 0 = 4I3 − 3I2 C. 6 = 2I1 + 3I2 + 4I3 D. 6 = 3I2 + 4I3
